sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
The Rain Totem is a crafted item that sets the weather for the next day to rainy. A Rain Totem can be activated by selecting it in inventory and pressing the Check button ( on PC, Y on Nintendo Switch, A on Xbox, X on PlayStation).
The crafting recipe becomes available at Foraging Level 9. One to three Rain Totems may also occasionally be found in treasure rooms in the Skull Cavern.

sections.heading: Caveats
sections.content:
- The weather in Pelican Town and Ginger Island can be different, and the weather will only be changed in the region where the Rain Totem is activated.
- A Rain Totem will not force the weather in Pelican Town to be rainy on festival days or on the 1st day of a season.

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: Rain Totem is not used in any bundles .

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: A Rain Totem can be used in the spool of the Sewing Machine to create the Totem Mask . It can be used in dyeing , serving as an orange dye at the dye pots, located in Emily 's and Haley 's house, 2 Willow Lane .

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content: The Rain Totem is not used in any quests .

sections.heading: Bugs
sections.content: - If a Rain Totem is used during Winter on the day before a snowy day, it will cause it to rain and snow simultaneously the following day.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.4 : Can now be used in Tailoring .
- 1.6 : Fixed a bug where using a Rain Totem on a stormy day would turn the next day's weather to stormy instead of rainy; storms could be chained in this way to obtain large numbers of Battery Packs .

rows: Activate to greatly increase the chance for rain tomorrow. Consumed on use.
